title: Casey's Marks 30 Million Meals* Donated to Families Across the Heartland
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Through its long-standing partnership with Feeding America®, the nation's largest hunger-relief organization, Casey's (NASDAQ: CASY) has helped provide 30 million meals* to people struggling with hunger in its local communities. Since establishing the partnership in 2020, Casey's guests are invited to join the movement to end hunger and participate in Casey's annual roundup at the register campaign supporting Feeding America. title: Retail Sales Data Shows Surge in Consumer Spending: 4 Winners
text: The U.S. retail sector has been resilient amid growing price pressures. Although sales have been slow, the sector has been growing at a steady pace as consumers continue to spend.

title: Retail Sales Data Shows Surge in Consumer Spending: 4 Winners
text: Retail sales are increasing, helping stocks like Urban Outfitters, Inc. (URBN), Abercrombie & Fitch Co. (ANF), Casey's General Stores, Inc. (CASY) and The Lovesac Company (LOVE).

title: 4 Stocks to Watch as Back-to-School Shopping Promises Growth
text: Parents and students are busy with last-minute shopping as schools across the United States are set to resume after the break.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch as Back-to-School Shopping Promises Growth
text: The back-to-school sales are expected to grow 12.5% this year, helping stocks like Apple, Inc. (AAPL), HP Inc. (HPQ), PC Connection, Inc. (CNXN) and Casey's General Stores, Inc. (CASY).

title: Casey's (CASY) Sets Ambitious Three-Year Strategic Plan
